subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-25 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: In the days of His Holiness the Prophet, there was one named Nu'man, most jovial in spirit, and with him a dark-visaged companion named Ma'iyyat. His Holiness the Prince commanded them to wage battle against one of the tribes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ایام حضرت رسول نعمان نامی بود بسیار شوخ و معیت نامی سیاه چهره.  حضرت امیر به محاربهٴ با یکی از قبائل فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @justice and wrath of God
